series_metadata.series_title: Loan originators and operations managers regulated by DFI-CF under applicable ORC/OAC laws.
series_metadata.series_description: These files relate to Consumer Finance loan originator, mortgage loan originator, temporary loan originator, temporary mortgage loan originator, and operations manager licensees/applicants (“originator”) under the Mortgage Broker Act and Ohio Mortgage Loan Act, and include the original application with pertinent attachments, financial statements, renewal applications, background reports, summary information, general correspondence related to application and renewal, and a copy of the licenses specific to the individual originator. These files do not include records stored on or pertaining to the Nationwide Multistate Licensing System.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain original paper files in operating area while the originator is active/escrowed until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for seven (7) years after the date of the originator’s last application, renewal, origination, or compliance activity., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
